name: Endothelial telomere dysfunction in aged human cells and mouse vascular-metabolic impairment
summary: A translational study measuring age-related endothelial telomere dysfunction in human cells and testing endothelial-specific telomere dysfunction in mice.
population: Human lung microvascular endothelial cells from young and old donors
model_system: Endothelial-specific mouse model of induced telomere dysfunction
